scripts.build: tsc --ignoreConfig runtime.ts --target ES5 --lib ES2015,DOM --module none --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --outFile build/index.js
scripts.dev: tsc --ignoreConfig runtime.ts --target ES5 --lib ES2015,DOM --module none --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --outFile build/index.js --watch
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/validate-runtime-build.mjs && npm run test:unit
